contentBlocks.original:
वसुदेवसुतं देवं कंसचाणूरमर्दनम् ।
देवकी परमानन्दं कृष्णं वंदे जगद्गुरुम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vasudevasutaṃ devaṃ kaṃsacāṇūramardanam .
devakī paramānandaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vaṃde jagadgurum ..
contentBlocks.translation: Son of Vasudeva, divine lord, the killer of Kamsa and Chaanura, the supreme happiness of Devaki, we bow to Krishna, the Guru (teacher) of the universe.
contentBlocks.meanings: वसुदेवसुतं (vasudevasutaṃ) – son of Vasudeva (vasudeva:Vasudeva | sutaṃ:son); देवं (devaṃ) – divine lord; कंसचाणूरमर्दनम् (kaṃsacāṇūramardanam) – killer of Kamsa and Chaanura (kaṃsa:Kamsa | cāṇūra:Chaanura | mardanam:killer); देवकी (devakī) – Devaki; परमानन्दं (paramānandaṃ) – supreme happiness (parama:supreme | ānandaṃ:happiness); कृष्णं (kṛṣṇaṃ) – Krishna; वंदे (vaṃde) – I bow; जगद्गुरुम् (jagadgurum) – teacher of the universe (jagat:universe | gurum:teacher);
